name: Marrow Beans Corn
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces any cooked beans (kidney beans look good in this dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the onions until softened.
2. Dice the marrow into fairly large cubes.
3. Add tomatoes, puree, garlic, and herbs to the onions and simmer for ten minutes (uncovered to thicken the sauce).
4. Add the marrow and cook until tender, from 10-20 minutes depending on the size of the marrow cubes.
5. When the marrow is almost cooked, add the beans and sweetcorn and cook until the marrow is ready and the mixture is piping hot. Eat sprinkled with freshly milled black pepper.
Note: This dish is best when served over brown rice. If additional water is needed during cooking, keep it to a minimum.
